title: pasania glutinosa
intro: Pasania glutinosa, also known as the Burmese pasania, is a deciduous tree species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pasania glutinosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain infections. Pasania glutinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and its bark, leaves, and roots are commonly used in traditional medicine.
